belier.author: Sibylle
belier.intro: Aries, this Sun-ruled Sunday warms your Martian fire and invites it to glow longer rather than in brief flashes. The Sun in Taurus gently asks you to embody a forward push in matter, in a project, in a steady chosen gesture. You can use the day to turn a hurried vision into a first tangible and sincere step.
belier.love: A warm, continuous presence touches more today than any flaring declaration of the moment for your fire heart. In a couple, you can propose something simple and beautiful, a meal outside, a slow walk, a quiet held tenderness. Single, your tempered enthusiasm draws a person who loves your fire yet also looks for reliable warmth.
belier.work: A personal project asks for a small reorganization today before it picks up speed again this coming week. You can use the calm of Sunday to reread a file, clarify a priority, write down one clean and useful objective. An idea you have been carrying for a few days gains real strength as soon as you say it out loud.
belier.energy: Lively solar energy that loves chosen movement rather than imposed running this quiet spring Sunday. Your body responds well to a gentle outdoor sport, an easy run or a spring bike ride without excess.
belier.intuition: A simple feeling of joy quietly shows you today where to place your durable yes for the week. Follow that bright trail, it gently leads you away from false fire and closer to your truer flame.
belier.mantra: My fire settles to burn longer and truer.

taureau.author: Sibylle
taureau.intro: Taurus, your Sun shines in your own sign on this solar Sunday and offers a full day of grounded presence. Venus, your ruling planet, supports your taste for simple pleasures, beauty, and the concrete shared with care. You can use the day to gently celebrate what already grows in your life without forcing or rushing it.
taureau.love: Tenderness embodied in precise gestures is worth all the gold in the world today for your earthy sign. In a couple, savor a meal, a perfume, a fabric, a chosen touch with the person who shares your spring. Single, you draw a sensorial presence who loves the same slow gourmet rhythms as you do without rush.
taureau.work: You can today quietly lay the foundation of a material or financial project that has been ripening inside you. An idea connected to your body, your home, or your resources takes a lovely shape as soon as you write it down. A bit of Sunday planning brings more comfort to your week than you might expect right now.
taureau.energy: Full, slow and savory energy that loves gardening, cooking, and walking through the green of spring. Your body asks for a dose of nature this Sunday to align itself with its quietly seasonal inner rhythm.
taureau.intuition: Your senses speak clearly to you this morning and orient you toward what truly nourishes your inner self. Trust what smells good, what rings true, what looks beautiful, without overloading the moment with mental analysis.
taureau.mantra: I taste my season fully and gratefully.

gemeaux.author: Sibylle
gemeaux.intro: Gemini, this solar Sunday lights up your curious mind and invites you to choose a single conversation to deepen today. The Taurus Sun keeps teaching you the value of slow time and of ideas you actually embody in the world. You can use the day to make an important call, write a letter, formulate what truly matters to you.
gemeaux.love: A right word placed at the right moment weighs more than a hundred scattered messages this Sunday for you. In a couple, dare a real, gentle, slightly deeper question inside a quiet moment of your day together. Single, a conversation at a brunch, on a walk, around a shared book draws a presence interested in your lively spirit.
gemeaux.work: You can today put on paper an idea, a text, a proposal that has been waiting in your notebooks for a few days. Mercury, your ruler, supports your wish to clarify, and the Taurus Sun helps you choose the most solid wording. A friendly exchange with someone more experienced sheds useful light on a practical question in motion.
gemeaux.energy: Joyful, mental energy that loves to alternate between reading, walking, conversation, and small chosen errands today. A gentle yet varied activity does a lot of good to your spring body, eager for light and movement.
gemeaux.intuition: A phrase heard or read this morning resonates more strongly than you might have first thought today. Note it down, these little Mercurian pebbles trace a precise path for the week that is opening ahead.
gemeaux.mantra: I choose the right word over all the words.

cancer.author: Sibylle
cancer.intro: Cancer, the Moon, your ruler, slowly approaches her full light and invites you to honor your emotions of the day. The Taurus Sun supports your inner world by laying down a warm, tender stability inside your familiar landscape. You can use Sunday to offer your home a careful and beautiful kind of attention that truly resembles you.
cancer.love: Sweetness shared inside a familiar setting touches especially deep today for your sensitive water sign. In a couple, prepare a moment together at home, a lunch, a shared reading, a small parenthesis of mutual care. Single, you draw a person attentive to your sensitivity, capable of real and undemonstrative tenderness toward you.
cancer.work: A project linked to home, family, or the world of care moves forward by one tender step this Sunday. You can rearrange your work space, make it more welcoming, softer for the week that opens up tomorrow morning. An idea born from a childhood memory could nourish a future professional project, let it gently steep.
cancer.energy: Inner, tender energy that loves home cooking, a warm bath and the familiar Sunday rituals you cherish. Your body asks for a gentle care and a reassuring frame rather than for many social solicitations today.
cancer.intuition: Your deep feeling delivers a clear message today about a recent situation worth observing with quiet care. Write what the Moon whispers to you, her hints grow in accuracy as her full light approaches this week.
cancer.mantra: I listen to the tender wisdom of my heart.

lion.author: Sibylle
lion.intro: Leo, this solar Sunday is ruled by your own master planet and gives you a particularly luminous day of inner alignment. The Taurus Sun nonetheless invites you to embody your light in a concrete gesture rather than in a purely staged glow. You can use the day to celebrate a beloved person with a beautiful, simple, true attention.
lion.love: A warm and precise attention touches more today than any grand declaration made in front of a crowd. In a couple, choose a symbolic gift, a handwritten note, a meal cooked with care for the person you love most. Single, your solar and welcoming presence draws someone who knows how to honor your generosity with grace.
lion.work: You can today set a clear intention for the week and formulate it with real, quietly noble inner authority. A creative or artistic idea or one linked to your personal image takes a fresh turn as soon as you share it. A friendly figure brings you a precious encouragement to receive simply, without minimizing or overstating its glow.
lion.energy: Radiant warm energy that loves spring sun, beautiful outfits, and sober festive moments shared with chosen people. Your body responds well to a pleasant chosen activity, dance, a waterfront walk, gentle and joyful sport.
lion.intuition: Your heart knows precisely what truly deserves your light today and what only asks for politeness. Listen to the quiet pride that rises in you, it always distinguishes well the precious from the merely loud.
lion.mantra: My light gives, without needing to prove.

vierge.author: Sibylle
vierge.intro: Virgo, this solar Sunday and the Taurus Sun harmonize beautifully for your earthy sign so attentive to detail. The sky offers a rare softness, which lets you rest your analytical mind while staying anchored in the concrete world. You can use the day to prepare your week without overloading it, simply, carefully, with measured kindness.
vierge.love: A discreet and practical care offered to the other is worth all the brilliant words this Sunday for you. In a couple, propose a useful and tender gesture, a service that simplifies the life of your loved one this coming week. Single, your attentive precise presence draws a person who knows how to recognize your finesse without minimizing it.
vierge.work: You can today tidy your notes, order your priorities, prepare your calendar with your usual methodical clarity. Mercury supports your taste for the right detail, and the Taurus Sun helps you savor each small win without overshooting. An idea linked to your health, your hygiene, or your daily routine deserves a few minutes of calm reflection.
vierge.energy: Clean and stable energy that loves healthy routines, precise walks, and well chosen pauses this Sunday at home. Your body asks for a soft gourmet kindness today, a long tea, a book, a moment in the garden without rush.
vierge.intuition: A detail noticed at home or outside contains the right message for your day today, with quiet clarity. Your eyes know how to see, trust what they spot first, it is rarely by chance with someone who watches as well as you.
vierge.mantra: I prepare my week with attentive softness.

balance.author: Sibylle
balance.intro: Libra, this solar Sunday and the Taurus Sun give Venus, your ruling planet, an especially graceful and earthy support. The sky invites you to live a day of simple beauty, in harmony with your loved ones and within yourself. You can use the day to cultivate the tender aesthetic of your daily life, flowers, music, a shared sweetness.
balance.love: A quiet harmony settles today inside your most important bond without forcing or claiming anything from anyone. In a couple, savor a simple moment together, a pretty meal, a walk, a tender film chosen to share between you both. Single, your poised grace draws someone who loves your sense of beauty and your ability to truly listen.
balance.work: You can today take care of your work environment so that it becomes more inspiring for the week to come. An idea linked to your image, your style, your public presentation would benefit from gently ripening this Sunday. A friendly conversation with a tactical person sheds useful light on a relational question open these last few days.
balance.energy: Graceful calm energy that loves the arts, beautiful encounters and harmonious atmospheres this Sunday at home. Your body responds well to a soft activity, yoga, slow dance, stretching, inside a quietly elegant frame.
balance.intuition: Your sense of fairness clearly orients you toward what soothes and away from any surplus of inner tension. Follow this Venusian compass, it preserves your inner balance better today than any heavy effort of reasoning.
balance.mantra: I cultivate the simple beauty of my day.

scorpion.author: Sibylle
scorpion.intro: Scorpio, the Moon approaches your sign before her full light soon to come and already amplifies your deep sensitivity. The Taurus Sun stays opposite you and invites you to receive the other as a precious partner rather than a challenge. You can use the day to honor an important bond with a true and tender word, sincerely shared.
scorpion.love: A truth placed with delicacy transforms today, in a lasting way, the quality of your most precious bond and tie. In a couple, dare to say a feeling long kept inside, the sky supports this courageous and beautiful honesty. Single, you draw a person able to hold your intensity without flinching, who genuinely loves your sincere depth.
scorpion.work: You can today deepen a research subject, an analysis, a strategic reflection in a useful and quiet discretion. Pluto supports your wish to go to the essential, and the Taurus Sun helps you embody your intuition into the real. A financial question deserves a few minutes of calm attention to prepare a decision in the middle of the week.
scorpion.energy: Dense concentrated energy that loves silence, swimming and deep breathing practices this quiet spring Sunday. Your body asks for time away from noise today, in a corner chosen for its tranquility and its gentle quietness.
scorpion.intuition: A sign repeated for a few days now takes its full meaning today before your attentive watchful eyes. Note the coincidence that calls to you, it traces a real lead to follow for your present month of May.
scorpion.mantra: I speak my truth with clear tenderness.

sagittaire.author: Sibylle
sagittaire.intro: Sagittarius, this solar Sunday widens your Jupiterian horizon and invites you to imagine the next part of your road. The Taurus Sun however asks you to set one foot in the concrete, a budget, a calendar, a precise idea to embody. You can use the day to connect your vision to the small things that will make it possible soon enough.
sagittaire.love: A promise of shared adventure brings a lovely breath today to your most important bond and to its long road. In a couple, speak together about a common horizon, a trip to prepare, a project that makes both of you vibrate. Single, your sincere enthusiasm draws someone who shares your values and your taste for true meaning in life.
sagittaire.work: You can today sketch the plan of a wider project that has been ripening inside you for several weeks now. Jupiter, your ruler, supports your vision, and the Taurus Sun helps you choose a first tangible and feasible step. A reading, a podcast, or a Sunday encounter brings precious light on your orientation for the coming months.
sagittaire.energy: Wide dynamic energy that loves open spaces, hiking, and endurance exercises this quiet spring Sunday outdoors. A long open walk in nature nourishes your body just as much as your spirit on its current path.
sagittaire.intuition: A word crossed by chance today delivers a precious teaching to put into practice during the coming week. Listen to the teacher who shows up in the simplest forms, this is often how he likes to find you.
sagittaire.mantra: My vision links itself to the steps that carry.

capricorne.author: Sibylle
capricorne.intro: Capricorn, this solar Sunday invites you to set down your Saturnian ambition and taste what you have already built since autumn. The Taurus Sun supports your earthy nature and offers a rare spring grounding, soft and concrete at the same time. You can use the day to silently celebrate the road traveled and savor a real, fully earned pause.
capricorne.love: A tender commitment said without solemnity touches today the heart of your loved one more profoundly than expected. In a couple, propose a simple structured moment, a lunch, a walk, a shared material project to sketch out together. Single, your solid sincere presence draws a person endowed with a reassuring and beautiful affective maturity.
capricorne.work: You can today look at your week with a bit of altitude and choose a single main objective worth honoring. Saturn, your ruler, appreciates this teaching, and the Taurus Sun helps you embody this priority through concrete gestures. A patrimonial or financial idea deserves a few minutes of calm attention to prepare a wise upcoming decision.
capricorne.energy: Enduring calm energy that loves walking, hiking and structured exercises this gentle spring Sunday outdoors. Your body asks above all for a little softness and fresh air after a likely full and demanding week.
capricorne.intuition: An old memory rises in you with a precious message this morning, in the form of a familiar gesture. Listen to what this root says to you, it sheds useful light on a present question in your daily life.
capricorne.mantra: I savor the fruit of my patient efforts.

verseau.author: Sibylle
verseau.intro: Aquarius, this solar Sunday calms a bit of the Uranian buzz and invites you to embody your innovative ideas in simple gestures. The Taurus Sun across your axis reminds you of the importance of body, place, and matter as joyful allies. You can use the day to slow down, to feel, to touch what surrounds you and reconnect with the concrete real.
verseau.love: A soft friendship inside the couple takes a particularly precious and tender flavor today for your air-sign heart. In a couple, speak together of your mutual freedom and of your renewed choice to walk side by side serenely. Single, you draw a person who respects your space, capable of real presence without any kind of suffocation.
verseau.work: You can today sketch the contours of a collective or technological project close to your heart these last days. Uranus supports your originality, and the Taurus Sun helps you choose a truly concrete and feasible first step. A friendly conversation with a pragmatic person sheds useful light on a point you were perhaps overinvesting.
verseau.energy: Quiet mental energy that loves stimulating conversations and contemplative pauses this gentle spring Sunday at home. Your body asks for a bit of calm and a bit of walking after a week likely well filled with ideas.
verseau.intuition: A collective intuition crosses through you today and concerns more than just yourself within your close inner circle. Note it down to share at the right moment, with the right people, without rushing its final formulation today.
verseau.mantra: My ideas embody themselves in the chosen real.

poissons.author: Sibylle
poissons.intro: Pisces, this solar Sunday opens a clear window onto your Neptunian universe so often fluid and quietly inspired. The Taurus Sun supports this teaching by inviting you to embody concretely an intuition, a dream, an artistic vision in motion. You can use the day to set a first tangible gesture around a project that touches you deeply within.
poissons.love: A mature sensitive tenderness unfolds today inside your most precious and most carefully held bond of the heart. In a couple, share a soft yet concrete moment, a creative workshop, a meal cooked together, a walk along the water. Single, your welcoming presence draws someone able to honor your sensitivity with respect and real affective solidity.
poissons.work: You can today move forward gently on an artistic, therapeutic, or creative discipline that lives close to your heart. Neptune supports your inspiration, and the Taurus Sun helps you choose a concrete format to share what you carry. A Sunday encounter with an inspiring yet realistic person gives you the right breath for the coming week ahead.
poissons.energy: Soft fluid energy that loves water, slow dance, and conscious breathing practices this gentle spring Sunday at home. Your body asks for an attentive care and a protection against the excessive solicitations of the outer world.
poissons.intuition: A nocturnal dream or a morning vision left a clear message for you to interpret calmly during the day today. Note the image that returns, it contains a true piece of information for your current month of May ahead.
poissons.mantra: I gently shape my most beautiful inner visions.
